# Reeflex Docs

> Reeflex is a decision firewall for AI agents: a control point between an AI agent and your systems that judges each action by its real-world impact — reversibility, blast radius, externality — and allows, holds for a human, or denies it before it runs. On any backend, deterministically (zero LLM in the decision path).

Documentation for the open-source `reeflex-core` engine and its reference adapters. A decision firewall inspects the **action** (what it would do), not the **traffic** (prompts, tokens, requests) — so a fully authorized agent with a clean prompt is still stopped before a destructive action such as a bulk production delete. The engine evaluates a universal Action Envelope with OPA/Rego and returns allow, deny, or require_approval (a hold). Open tier is Apache 2.0.

## Docs
- [Getting started](https://docs.reeflex.io/getting-started/): install an adapter, try a real decision in 30 seconds, and the observe → enforce playbook
- [Concepts](https://docs.reeflex.io/concepts/): the Action Envelope, the five rules (R1–R5), allow/hold/deny, the fail-closed invariant, sessions, HIL/HOTL/AIL
- [Architecture](https://docs.reeflex.io/architecture/): the seams, guarantees, and the decision round-trip diagrams
- [Adapters](https://docs.reeflex.io/adapters/): Claude Code, WordPress, n8n, and the MCP gateway
- [Reference — REST API](https://docs.reeflex.io/reference/rest-api/): POST /v1/decide, the holds API, auth, and errors
- [Reference — Action Envelope](https://docs.reeflex.io/reference/action-envelope/): verb + three risk axes + magnitude + session + approval
- [Reference — Configuration](https://docs.reeflex.io/reference/configuration/): every environment variable

## Policy & operations
- [Open core](https://docs.reeflex.io/open-core/): what is open (Apache 2.0) versus the commercial tier
- [Operations](https://docs.reeflex.io/operations/) and [SIEM export](https://docs.reeflex.io/siem/)
- [FAQ](https://docs.reeflex.io/faq/)
- [Roadmap](https://docs.reeflex.io/roadmap/)

## Source
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Reeflex-io/reeflex)
- [SPEC — Action Envelope + Adapter Contract](https://github.com/Reeflex-io/reeflex/blob/main/reeflex-spec/SPEC.md)
